elements.title: Gwen
elements.contents: ... that Gwen (pictured) went viral in 2025 due to the way she ate one of her country's most beloved street foods?

elements.title: a book on colonial history
elements.contents: ... that the title of a book on colonial history was first inspired by a housemate's seminar paper on Sigmund Freud?

elements.title: a Filipino born in Grenada who sometimes pretended to be African-American
elements.contents: ... that fried chicken was popularized in the Philippines by a Filipino born in Grenada who sometimes pretended to be African-American?

elements.title: a 2025 gubernatorial election in Eastern Samar
elements.contents: ... that a 2025 gubernatorial election in Eastern Samar was won by a 25-year-old?

elements.title: Tomomi Jiena Sumi
elements.contents: ... that Tomomi Jiena Sumi was inspired to take up voice acting after noticing the differences between Disney Channel's Japanese and English broadcasts?

elements.title: Tropical Storm Sibyl
elements.contents: ... that Tropical Storm Sibyl caused mudflows up to 5.5 metres (18 ft) deep from the flanks of Mount Pinatubo in 1995?

elements.title: Kulay
elements.contents: ... that Kulay named their debut album 100,000 Pesos Worth of Karma after the cost of settling a dispute with their former manager?

elements.title: Philippine Independent Catholic Church
elements.contents: ... that the Philippine Independent Church sued the Philippine Independent Catholic Church over its name?

elements.title: Joey Comiso
elements.contents: ... that Joey Comiso first became interested in science after his village mistook an airplane contrail for the end of the world?
